LAW AND MOTION, 302, RE: PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES ARE IMMEDIATELY ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER "IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41(A). DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 28, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC.'s DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Plaintiff CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC.'s DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT is off calendar. The parties are immediately ordered to meet and confer "in person or by telephone" in compliance with CCP 430.41(a). Defendants' response to the first amended complaint is now due by July 28, 2023.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. First amended cross-complaint filed May 3, 2023.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
